topic.title: Product Installation and Configuration Guide
topic.shortdesc: This document describes how to install.Smart Document Platformand perform basic configuration.

body.p: Please ensure the system meets the followingMinimum RequirementsThen proceed with the installation.
InFileSettingsParameters can be adjusted in the menu.
body.note: During installationDo notDisconnect the power supply.

section.title: Step 1: Download the installation package
section.p: fromOfficial WebsiteDownload the latest version of the installer.
